import_method: private workflow should fetch raw pci.ids, parse according to pci.ids(5), deduplicate existing hardware/manufacturer records, and preserve license metadata.
name: PCI ID Repository / pci.ids
why_relevant: PCI devices need numeric IDs translated to vendor/device names for driver, firmware, kernel, dmesg and Windows Device Manager triage.

import_method: private workflow should fetch raw usb.ids, parse vendor/product/class hierarchy and compare against existing manufacturers/devices.
name: Linux USB ID Repository / usb.ids
why_relevant: USB VID/PID pairs appear in lsusb, dmesg, Windows hardware IDs, ADB/Fastboot, embedded device recovery and driver triage.

name: Microsoft PCI hardware ID formats
why_relevant: Windows logs and Device Manager use PCI\VEN_xxxx&DEV_xxxx&SUBSYS_...&REV_... forms that need normalization before matching pci.ids.

name: DeviceHunt PCI/USB database public count check
why_relevant: Useful sanity check that public PCI/USB device universe exceeds 5000 entries and needs structured import rather than manual authoring.
